technology_gate.input: vLLM-style serving trace plus worker queue/KV residency state
technology_gate.decision: round-robin vs least-queue vs KV-aware request routing with failover
technology_gate.metric: TTFT, TPOT, throughput, cache hit rate, queue wait, retry count, latency regression

scenario: worker-1 timeout after half of trace; retry to healthy worker; quarantine failed worker

latency_regression.note: global p95 can improve if quarantine removes an overloaded worker; retry_timeout_overhead_ms records the per-retry failure cost
